title: $MAX_MONS
text: $MAX_MONS Specify the maximum number of Uniface Router Monitors that the Uniface Router can accept. $MAX_MONS {=} NumberOfMonitors Arguments NumberOfMonitors —maximum number of Uniface Router Monitors that the Uniface Router can accept. Defaults Assignment file: urouter.asn Section: [SETTINGS] Default value: None Description By default, the Uniface Router can accept an unlimited number of Uniface Router Monitors.
